zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Englefield於1425年出生在英國英格蘭艾可分興費爾德時，她的父親Philip Englefield50歲，母親Alice Rossell46歲。她和Edmund Brudenell至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1470年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾潔利享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Englefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Englefield (in Berks and Surrey).  Compare  Inglefield  .

variants.name: Inglefield
meanings: English: locative name from Englefield (Surrey), recorded as Ingelfeld in 1282, or Englefield (Berks).

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Englefield was born in 1425, in Finchingfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Philip Englefield, was 50 and her mother, Alice Rossell, was 46. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Edmund Brudenell. She died in 1470, in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Englefield est née en 1425, à Finchingfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip Englefield, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Alice Rossell, avait 46 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Edmund Brudenell. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Englefield 1425 in Finchingfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Englefield 50 und ihre Mutter Alice Rossell 46. Sie hatte mit Edmund Brudenell mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Edmund Brudenell. Morì nel 1470, nel Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Englefieldが1425年にイギリスイギリスエセックスフィンチングフィールドで生まれた時，父Philip Englefieldは50歳，母Alice Rossellは46歳であった。彼女はEdmund Brudenellとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1470年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘジャーリーで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.Amersham with Coleshill, Buckinghamshire: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤 위스 콜레시
ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Englefield(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핑친그필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Englefield(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Rossell(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 Edmund Brudenell(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 헤저리에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에 묻혔다.
